pi_items.source: Task instructions and the verifier script explicitly require the rule to be named 'Critical_Response_Auto'.
Verified via scripts/task_utils.sh which sets ADMIN_USER='admin' as the default ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer administrator.
Web search for ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer incident severities confirms 'Critical' is one of the built-in primary severity levels.
The setup_task.sh instruction and export_result.sh script explicitly expect the exported file at this location.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Incident Assignment Rule named 'Critical_Response_Auto'. The assignee 'admin' is the default administrator account in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. 'Critical' is confirmed as a valid, default incident severity in the software. The task expects the audit trail to be exported exactly to '/home/ga/audit_evidence.csv'.
